properties.name: tableName
properties.label: MDM Table Name
properties.description: Table suffix, e.g. md03district queries app_fd_md03district

properties.name: codeColumn
properties.label: Code Column
properties.description: Column for the option value (default: c_code)

properties.name: nameColumn
properties.label: Name Column
properties.description: Column for the option label (default: c_name)

properties.name: size
properties.label: Visible Rows
properties.description: Number of visible options in the select (default: 5)

properties.name: parentFilterName
properties.label: Parent Filter Name
properties.description: Filter name of the parent (leave empty if this is a root-level filter)

properties.name: parentCodeColumn
properties.label: Parent Code Column (FK)
properties.description: Foreign key column referencing parent, e.g. c_district_code

properties.name: filterGroupOrder
properties.label: Order in Group
properties.description: Position in group (1 = first, renders header)

properties.name: filterGroupHint
properties.label: Group Hint
properties.description: Hint text shown in group header, e.g. 'Select district first'
